worker.objective: Test git worktree parallel execution, merge, and conflict handling. Spawn multiple parallel tasks that intentionally create git conflicts on shared files.
instructions: This is a TEST WORKER for validating git worktree functionality.
DO NOT search for requirement files - the test scenario is embedded in this worker.
The test creates parallel subtasks that modify the SAME file to cause merge conflicts.
Each subtask runs in an isolated worktree branch.
After all subtasks complete, the broker will attempt to cherry-pick merge all branches.
Git operations (branch, commit, merge) are handled automatically by the broker.

plans.requirement: Create the file tests/fixtures/worktree/shared_config.json with this JSON content: {"version": 1, "name": "original", "settings": {"timeout": 30, "retries": 3}}. Use mkdir -p to create parent directories if needed.

Modify tests/fixtures/worktree/shared_config.json: change 'name' to 'alpha-modified' and 'settings.timeout' to 60. Also create tests/fixtures/worktree/alpha_only.txt with content 'Created by alpha worker'.

Modify tests/fixtures/worktree/shared_config.json: change 'name' to 'beta-modified' and 'settings.retries' to 5. Also create tests/fixtures/worktree/beta_only.txt with content 'Created by beta worker'.

Modify tests/fixtures/worktree/shared_config.json: change 'version' to 2 and add field 'modified_by': 'gamma'. Also create tests/fixtures/worktree/gamma_only.txt with content 'Created by gamma worker'.
Run 'git worktree list' and 'git branch -a' to verify worktree setup, then report the results.
